languages.text: "Я желаю общаться с Нунциусом и мне не потребуется переводчик! Посмотрим насколько я хорошо понимаю твоего коллегу".
"I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."
languages.original_text: "Я желаю общаться с Нунциусом и мне не потребуется переводчик! Посмотрим насколько я хорошо понимаю твоего коллегу".

traits.locale_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."
"I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."
"I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

languages.text: «Deseo comunicarme con Nuncius, ¡y no preciso de ningún intérprete! Veamos si logro entender a su colega».
languages.original_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

traits.locale_text: «Deseo comunicarme con Nuncius, ¡y no preciso de ningún intérprete! Veamos si logro entender a su colega».

languages.text: “我想在没有翻译的情况下和努恩修斯聊聊。我想看看，你那位同僚的话我能领会多少。”
languages.original_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

traits.locale_text: “我想在没有翻译的情况下和努恩修斯聊聊。我想看看，你那位同僚的话我能领会多少。”

languages.text: « Je souhaite parler à Nuncius, et sans interprète ! Voyons à quel point je suis capable de comprendre votre collègue. »
languages.original_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

traits.locale_text: « Je souhaite parler à Nuncius, et sans interprète ! Voyons à quel point je suis capable de comprendre votre collègue. »

languages.text: "Nuncius'la iletişim kurmak istiyorum. Tercümanlık yapmanı istemiyorum! Bakalım meslektaşını ne kadar iyi anlayabiliyorum..."
languages.original_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'la iletişim kurmak istiyorum. Tercümanlık yapmanı istemiyorum! Bakalım meslektaşını ne kadar iyi anlayabiliyorum..."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスと語り合いたい。通訳は不要だ！ 君の同僚をどれだけ理解できるか試してみよう」
languages.original_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスと語り合いたい。通訳は不要だ！ 君の同僚をどれだけ理解できるか試してみよう」

languages.text: "Ich möchte mit Nuncius kommunizieren und werde keinen Übersetzer brauchen! Mal sehen, wie gut ich Euren Kollegen verstehe."
languages.original_text: "I wish to communicate with Nuncius, and I will not require an interpreter! Let's see how well I understand your colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Ich möchte mit Nuncius kommunizieren und werde keinen Übersetzer brauchen! Mal sehen, wie gut ich Euren Kollegen verstehe."
